# Native overlay static library, linked into the Flutter Windows runner.
#
# This file is wired into Flutter's standard windows/CMakeLists.txt via
# add_subdirectory(native_overlay) — the standard `flutter create -p
# windows` scaffold is NOT reproduced here since it must be generated by
# the real Flutter SDK on a dev machine; this CMakeLists.txt targets the
# `native_overlay` subdirectory it expects to find alongside `runner/`.
#
# /W4 warnings-as-errors baseline per 04-PHASES.md Phase 0 gate and
# 03-RULES.md §6 ("no merging with ... native compiler warnings above the
# baseline").

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
project(native_overlay LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Core Win32-facing sources — no Flutter SDK headers required, so this
# set alone is what the standalone GoogleTest target (windows/tests/)
# links against when built outside a full Flutter checkout.
set(NATIVE_OVERLAY_CORE_SOURCES
  logging/native_log.cpp
  logging/native_log.h
  native/overlay_window.cpp
  native/overlay_window.h
  native/overlay_manager.cpp
  native/overlay_manager.h
  native/dpi.cpp
  native/dpi.h
  native/animation.cpp
  native/animation.h
  hotkeys/hotkey_manager.cpp
  hotkeys/hotkey_manager.h
  capture/display_affinity.cpp
  capture/display_affinity.h
  ffi/overlay_api.cpp
  ffi/overlay_api.h
)

add_library(native_overlay STATIC ${NATIVE_OVERLAY_CORE_SOURCES})

# method_channel_handlers.cpp includes flutter/method_channel.h etc.,
# only available once this CMakeLists.txt is add_subdirectory()'d from
# the real Flutter-generated windows/CMakeLists.txt (which defines
# flutter_wrapper_plugin before reaching this file). Adding the source
# conditionally — not just the link — keeps the standalone test build
# (no Flutter SDK present) from failing on a missing header.
if (TARGET flutter_wrapper_plugin)
  target_sources(native_overlay PRIVATE
    ffi/method_channel_handlers.cpp
    ffi/method_channel_handlers.h
  )
endif()

target_include_directories(native_overlay PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})

if (MSVC)
  target_compile_options(native_overlay PRIVATE /W4 /WX)
else()
  # Non-MSVC toolchains are not a supported build target for this project
  # (Windows-only per 01-SRD.md §7) — flags kept permissive here only so
  # the native GoogleTest target can still be linted in this sandbox's
  # CI dry-run step (see .github/workflows/ci.yml).
  target_compile_options(native_overlay PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)
endif()

target_link_libraries(native_overlay PRIVATE dwmapi user32 gdi32)

if (TARGET flutter_wrapper_plugin)
  target_link_libraries(native_overlay PRIVATE flutter_wrapper_plugin)
endif()

# Native GoogleTest target — only meaningful against the core sources;
# skipped automatically if this is configured standalone without a
# Windows/MSVC toolchain available (e.g. a dry-run on non-Windows CI).
if (WIN32)
  add_subdirectory(tests)
endif()
